incident_title: Suspicious treasury outflow alert on hot wallet
current_status: Under investigation; containment not yet executed
affected_systems_assets: Treasury hot wallet, signer operations, payout automation
potential_business_impact: Potential unauthorized transfer and downstream treasury disruption
summary: An automated alert reported an unexpected outbound transfer pattern from a treasury hot wallet. The activity is not yet confirmed as malicious.
current_observed_indicators: Transfer pattern deviates from normal payout cadence
No confirmed operator maintenance window recorded
confirmed_facts: A treasury monitoring alert was generated at 2026-04-19T16:20:00Z
The wallet under review is classified as a hot wallet
No approved emergency treasury run is documented in the incident input
working_hypotheses: Unauthorized wallet use or signer compromise
Misconfigured automation or unintended payout batch
False positive caused by expected but undocumented operational activity

impact_assessment.funds_at_risk: Unknown pending wallet balance, transfer value, and signer scope verification
impact_assessment.systems_affected: Treasury payout operations and related automation
impact_assessment.operational_risk: High if treasury automation remains active during investigation
impact_assessment.reputational_risk: Moderate to high if unauthorized movement is confirmed
impact_assessment.regulatory_compliance_risk: Potentially material if customer or custodial funds were involved

immediate_actions.description: Preserve wallet, automation, and alert logs before any configuration changes
immediate_actions.rationale: This protects forensic evidence and supports later attribution and root-cause analysis.

immediate_actions.description: Temporarily suspend non-essential treasury automation if pre-authorized by playbook
immediate_actions.rationale: This reduces additional fund movement risk while keeping the action reversible.

immediate_actions.description: Review current balances, recent transactions, and signer access scope for the hot wallet
immediate_actions.rationale: This confirms whether there is active loss, ongoing attacker access, or a benign explanation.

investigation_onchain_data: Recent outbound transactions from the hot wallet
Role or admin changes on related contracts
investigation_wallets_contracts_transact: Treasury hot wallet address under alert
Destination wallet addresses in the suspicious transfers
Any contracts touched by the suspicious transactions
investigation_access_changes: Recent IAM or secret access changes
Any CI/CD deployments affecting payout automation

escalation_decision.why: Potential treasury exposure and possible ongoing fund movement justify immediate cross-functional response.

unknowns: Whether active attacker access still exists
Whether any downstream systems were also accessed
confirm_next: Validate the outbound transaction set and destination addresses
Confirm signer access history and automation job ownership
Decide whether to suspend treasury automation
recommended_next_step: Validate the exact outbound transactions and signer activity now, then decide within the next review window whether treasury automation should be temporarily suspended under the approved containment playbook.
